title: stylidium maritimum
intro: Stylidium maritimum, also known as the sea-dragon or kangaroo paws, is a rare and unique plant species native to the coastal regions of Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The medicinal properties of Stylidium maritimum have been found to have various health benefits, including antibacterial and antiviral effects, making it a potential treatment for infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
